name: Shroud-Forged Psionic Machines (Shadows DLC)
description: The first-ever psionic machine empire made possible by the Shadows of the Shroud DLC. Uses the new Shroud-Forged origin to create machines reshaped by a shroud entity. Features unique shroud-forged pops that can't do menial jobs but excel at complex tasks, shroud observation buildings that produce Zro and research, and the ability to 'Pierce the Shroud' to terraform planets unpredictably. Combined with Energy Extractors civic (enables psionic ascension) and Pattern Finders civic (cycling buffs every 13 years), plus the new Cranial Megatrophy trait (+25% researcher efficiency), this creates a unique tech-focused psionic machine playstyle.

strategy.core_mechanic: Shroud-Forged origin provides psionic machine pops reshaped by shroud entity. Start with 1,000 shroud-forged pops (can't do menial jobs, +complex drone output, +efficiency). Homeworld has 4x Shroud-Touched regions (+5% efficiency each = 20% total, +1 Zro each = 4 Zro). Unlock Zro Distillation tech at start. Get Shroud Observation Complex building (10 observation drone jobs: produce physics/society research + Zro). Can 'Pierce the Shroud' to terraform planets unpredictably.
strategy.origin_situation: Start with 'Forged by the Shroud' situation that progresses through the game. Completing stages unlocks additional shroud powers and interactions. This is main quest line for the origin.
strategy.energy_extractors_civic: CRITICAL CIVIC: Allows machines to go psionic (normally impossible). -10% resources from jobs, -research speed, -pop growth, -mechanical assembly speed. BUT: -50% leader upkeep, +50% leader lifespan, +25% leader XP gain, +0.1% empire energy per pop. Enables special edicts: Energy Drain (leaders never die but -40% assembly), Nexus Charge (+unity but -assembly), Convergence of Will (+3 ruler skill but -assembly). Can build Siphoned Battery building: unity from jobs, trade from maintenance drones. Energy drones produce unity + amenities + leader XP.
strategy.pattern_finders_civic: New Shadows DLC civic. Analyze celestial alignments for best outcomes. Get 'Galactic Dowsing' (+unity). When surveying, chance to increase resource deposit size. Every 13 years the cosmic cycle changes, giving different empire-wide buffs/debuffs (could be good or bad - RNG element).
strategy.cranial_megatrophy_trait: NEW PSIONIC MACHINE TRAIT (4 trait points!): -10% worker efficiency but +25% researcher efficiency. This is INSANE for tech-focused builds. Combined with shroud observation drones, tech output explodes. Also available: Cranial Hypertrophy (2 points, half the penalty), Uncanny Intuition (+2 ruler skill).
strategy.trait_balance: Cranial Megatrophy costs 4 points, forcing many negative traits: High Bandwidth, Repurposed Hardware, Bulky. Took Mass-Produced (+assembly speed) to offset some assembly penalties. Worth it for +25% research.
strategy.shroud_forged_pops: Unique pop type. Cannot work menial drone jobs. +complex drone output. +efficiency. Special species rights. These are your elite researcher/specialist pops. Regular machine pops handle menial work.
strategy.shroud_observation_complex: Unique building from Zro Distillation tech. Provides 10 observation drone jobs. Each produces physics + society research + Zro. No engineering (interesting asymmetry). Stack these buildings for massive tech + Zro income.
strategy.pierce_the_shroud: Planetary decision available on shroud-touched worlds. 'Interface with the breach near our home world. The algorithm extends the shroud's influence for a femtosecond, allowing it to physically alter a planet's terrain. The results are unpredictable.' Can transform planets but outcomes are RNG.
strategy.early_game: 1. Focus on building Shroud Observation Complexes for tech + Zro. 2. Use shroud-forged pops for complex jobs. 3. Build regular robot assembly for menial workers. 4. Progress through 'Forged by the Shroud' situation. 5. Research psionic technologies.
strategy.mid_game: Take Mind Over Matter ascension perk. Continue psionic ascension path. Use Pattern Finders cycles strategically. Expand Zro production. Build Siphoned Battery monuments for unity scaling.
strategy.late_game: Complete Transcendence ascension. Fully utilize shroud panel mechanics. Pierce the Shroud to terraform strategic planets. With +25% researcher efficiency + shroud observation complexes + psionic bonuses, tech advantage is massive.
strategy.game_settings: Creator plays Grand Admiral Small galaxy, sped up tech and pop growth to showcase origin and new civics quickly.
strategy.why_unique: This is the ONLY way to create psionic machines. Completely new playstyle combining machine efficiency with psionic powers. Shroud-forged pops are quality over quantity. Pattern Finders adds RNG variance. Energy Extractors sacrifices early economy for late-game leader/unity scaling.

difficulty: Hard - New mechanics, complex origin situation, RNG elements from Pattern Finders cycles
notes: This is creator's FIRST playthrough of both Shroud-Forged origin and Shadows of the Shroud DLC, recorded as a learning experience. The build showcases all new DLC features: shroud-forged pops, Energy Extractors civic, Pattern Finders civic, Cranial Megatrophy trait, shroud observation complex, Pierce the Shroud mechanic. Very experimental but extremely unique gameplay. Shroud-forged pops are elite workers that can't do menial tasks - empire requires dual pop types.
